items.title: [正面] This is an extremely fun game.  Really not well kn...
items.summary:
This is an extremely fun game.  Really not well known, and it could garner more attention.  It's a rogue-like game and every character has a unique kit.  It is also one of the more challenging rogue-like games I've played.  The enemies are no joke with the later chapters and it makes you often go, "How the hell am I supposed to beat this."  When you do, it feels so amazing.  

This is a MUST try game.  Beautiful graphics, interesting monters, VERY interesting characters you can play, and the replayability factor is sky high.  Please try this hidden gem.

items.summary: Esta entretenido y siempre te recompensa bien pero el problema es su multijugador que es tan simple y aburrido de no ser por las recompensas no lo habria tocado nunca ademas es bastante complicado dominarlo todo es muy confuso
